title: Cleaning discussion channels
excerpt:

posts.author: Charles.Clarke (Charles Clarke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently users do not have the ability to delete discussion updates unless they are an admin or the author of the update, including automations.

There should be the capability for board owners or assigned project managers to delete updates on respective tasks. Equally, there should be automation capacity to remove messages after a certain time period - i.e. they ‘expire’.

posts.author: logicaryajain (Arya Jain)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey everyone! Just wanted to add—keeping discussion channels cleaning really helps with staying organized. I usually archive old channels and use threads for specific topics so nothing important gets lost. Makes the workspace much easier to navigate!
